summary: Tested public /contact page (SystemContact.js). The intro modal, founder card (Moataz Mehana / معتز مهنا), close-buttons, and Arabic/English founder-message translations work perfectly. However, the four circular icon buttons (Call, WhatsApp, WhatsApp 2, Email) DO NOT RENDER because GET /api/system/invoice-settings is hanging / returning 502 — the settings object stays empty, so the conditional render `{phone1 && ...}` evaluates to false for every icon. The Kurdish-language render could not be verified for the same reason (icons never become visible). Tagline & system-name fall back to hardcoded defaults so the header still appears.

critical.issue: Endpoint hangs (curl times out after 10s on both internal :8001 and public URL → Cloudflare 502). /api/health and /api/login-backgrounds respond fine, so the issue is specific to this route. Browser console on /contact shows: 'Failed to load resource: 502' and 'Failed to fetch settings: AxiosError'. Because settings is empty, none of the icon buttons render.

ui_bugs.issue: All four required icon buttons (contact-call-btn, contact-whatsapp-btn, contact-whatsapp2-btn, contact-email-btn) are absent at runtime because they depend on settings.system_phone / system_phone2 / system_email coming from the failing API. The container `data-testid=contact-icons` exists but is empty (hidden, 0 children). Captured screenshot confirms no icons in either desktop or 390px mobile view.

integration_issues.issue: API failure not surfaced to user (no error toast/banner). Page just silently hides all CTA icons.

action_items: URGENT: Investigate why GET /api/system/invoice-settings hangs (Cloudflare 502). It is the sole data source for the public Contact page. Likely culprits: (a) a slow / blocking Mongo query without timeout, (b) the endpoint requires auth/tenant context that public requests cannot supply, (c) a deadlock with another resource. Other public endpoints like /api/health and /api/login-backgrounds respond instantly.

Add a defensive fallback / error state in /app/frontend/src/pages/SystemContact.js: when settings fetch fails or returns empty, still render the icon buttons using sensible defaults (system_phone, system_phone2, system_email from a public config) and/or show an error message, so the QR-code workflow is not broken when the backend is degraded.
Optionally cache the last good settings in localStorage so the contact page works even when the API is briefly down.
critical_code_review_comments: SystemContact.js: Icon visibility is fully gated on data from a single uncached HTTP call. For a public marketing page reached via QR code, this is fragile — any API hiccup leaves customers with NO contact buttons. Recommend hard-coded fallback contact info or a static/SSR snapshot.
SystemContact.js: handleWhatsApp assumes Iraq +964 prefix unconditionally — fine here but document/clamp if internationalised.
Verified: WhatsApp 2 label correctly uses Latin '2' (label={t('واتساب') + ' 2'}) in all languages.
Verified: founder message is hard-coded as a JS array (no API dependency) and translates correctly via autoTranslate.js for en and ar; ku entries also exist in the dictionary.
Verified: close-x and close-btn both dismiss the intro modal.

success_rate.frontend: 60% — intro modal & translations OK; icon rendering broken due to backend

test_credentials: N/A — public page, no auth needed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run the same script (set localStorage 'app_language' before navigating, wait for [data-testid=contact-icons] to be visible) AFTER the /api/system/invoice-settings 502/timeout is fixed. Specifically verify: (1) 4 icons render (no website), (2) WhatsApp 2 uses Latin '2' in EN/AR/KU, (3) Kurdish tagline & intro modal render. Founder modal already verified working in AR and EN (English contains 'Maestro EGP was born', Arabic contains 'بدأت فكرة Maestro EGP'). The previous run hit Cloudflare 502 + Mongo connection refused early on but those self-recovered; the route /api/system/invoice-settings is still hanging at iteration end.
rca of the issue: Root cause: GET /api/system/invoice-settings hangs (no response within 10s, Cloudflare returns 502). Backend process is alive (/api/health returns 200) and other endpoints respond, so this single endpoint is either doing a slow/blocking DB call without a timeout or it expects a tenant/auth context that the anonymous /contact page cannot provide. Reproduction: `curl http://0.0.0.0:8001/api/system/invoice-settings -m 10` → timeout. Mitigation in code: in SystemContact.js, render fallback icons & contact info when fetch fails, and add a maximum 4-5s axios timeout so the loading spinner doesn't linger.
